testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Login should be successful expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Login should be successful expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepdefinitions.OutlineLoginSteps.user_should_see_result(OutlineLoginSteps.java:39) at ✽.user should see "Login Successful"(file:///F:/Capgemini/SeleniumGrid/selenium-grid-demo/src/test/resources/features/OutlineLogin.feature:7)
